title: Dermatology services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology services in Quito with clear medical direction, indicated technology, and continuous follow-up.
heading: Dermatology services
introTitle: Choose the route that best describes your concern today
introDeck: Each service explains goals, process, and control timing so you can decide with confidence before treatment starts.

featured.title: Comprehensive diagnosis unit
featured.copy: A complete first evaluation that orders clinical priorities and defines an understandable plan from the first visit.

featured.title: Case-indicated dermatology laser
featured.copy: Laser is indicated by phototype and objective, with medical settings reviewed at every control point.

featured.title: Telemedicine with responsible escalation
featured.copy: Remote care guides your next step and accelerates in-clinic consultation when direct examination is required.

sections.title: Clinical foundation
sections.deck: Routes for deep diagnosis and control of frequent conditions through staged follow-up.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: An initial map of risk, priorities, and treatment direction for a precise clinical start.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Flares and sensitivity are managed through adjustments based on your measured skin response.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early lesion assessment with warning criteria and an active monitoring plan.

sections.title: Medical treatments
sections.deck: Procedures are indicated only when they add clear clinical value and safe monitoring.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Traceable settings for lesions and scars, with medical control before and after each session.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: Skin renewal formulas are selected by phototype, sensitivity, and therapeutic goal.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Progressive firmness support with responsible indication and area-based follow-up.

sections.title: Continuity and family
sections.deck: Programs for long-term follow-up, mixed presentations, and family guidance.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Pediatric care with clear recommendations for caregivers and daily routines.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: A cross-route approach for combined symptoms requiring coordinated clinical interpretation.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Remote guidance clarifies whether online continuity is enough or in-clinic review is needed.

initiatives.title: Clinical photo registry
initiatives.copy: Images are compared under equivalent conditions to measure change with better precision.

initiatives.title: Active flare pathway
initiatives.copy: Early adjustments are triggered when lesions return or skin sensitivity rises.

initiatives.title: Guided family decisions
initiatives.copy: A practical home plan with warning signs and concrete next steps.

initiatives.title: Pigmented lesion route
initiatives.copy: Consultation is prioritized when a mole or spot has changed recently.

initiatives.title: Phototype calibration
initiatives.copy: Energy and frequency are tuned to your measured skin response.

initiatives.title: Skin support sequence
initiatives.copy: Session combinations improve texture and firmness with realistic expectations.

initiatives.title: Consent in plain language
initiatives.copy: Rights and responsibilities are explained without unnecessary legal complexity.

initiatives.title: Responsible remote escalation
initiatives.copy: Remote care remains active with clear thresholds for in-clinic transition.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: While web scheduling is updated, you can start through telemedicine or review active clinical service routes.
